nodes.name: Manual Trigger
nodes.notes: Run manually when you want to generate briefs for a new country. Set the country in the Set Country node.

nodes.name: Set Country Variables
nodes.notes: Change these values for each country. Run once per country.

nodes.name: Build Content Plan (13 items)
nodes.notes: Generates 2 pillar guides + 10 blogs + 1 FAQ hub = 13 content items per country.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-sonnet-4-6', max_tokens: 2000, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: `You are an SEO content strategist for urmortgage.online. Generate a content brief for: Country: ${$json.country_name}, Content Type: ${$json.type}, Topic: ${$json.title}, Category: ${$json.category}. Include: primaryKeyword, secondaryKeywords (5), outline (4-8 H2 sections with key points), 5 FAQs. Use ${$json.country_name}-specific terminology. Currency: ${$json.currency_symbol}. Tax term: ${$json.tax_term}. Respond ONLY with valid JSON.` }] }) }}

nodes.name: Create Airtable Row
nodes.notes: Creates one row per content item with Status=Ready. The Content Pipeline workflow picks these up and generates the actual content.
